item.title: 'I must find her and destroy her!' P!NK finds out about Davina Michelle
item.description: No, actually, P!NK is super cool and supportive about this Duch fan covering her song "What About Us" and totally knocking it out of the park. "That is better than I will ever sound," P!NK concedes. Here's the full cover: https://youtu.be/T5ZLdNA_wOc Also, you NEED to see what Davina Michelle can do when backed by a full band on television. She turns the awesome up to eleven. https://youtu.be/IEGfGpcBXxg
item.dc:creator: NeverShaveYourDuck

item.title: "Terrified" Cop abuses unarmed woman in school parking lot - tasering
item.description:
Cop uses legal wording to allow assault and tasering even though the legal wording of being concerned for his safety and terrified does not reflect the body camera footage https://medjournaldaily.com/michigan-cop-pulls-mother-out-of-car/

item.title: "Quick! quick! ..."
item.description:
Quick! quick! The cat's been sick.
Where? where? Under the chair.
Hasten! hasten! Fetch the basin.
Alack! alack! It is too late,
The carpet's in An awful state.
No! no! It's all in vain,
For she has licked it Up again.
SOURCE: https://www.instagram.com/shouxin13141/?hl=en
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: What Happened Today #78
item.description: They’re building the machine, but it’s not running smoothly. Trump loyalists are seizing agencies, reviving Schedule F, and wiring up surveillance networks with Palantir and Musk’s operatives. They’ve got their TV cronies in Homeland Security and ICE playing database builder. But here’s the thing: the courts aren’t folding. Protesters are back in the streets. And every delay, every veto, every injunction is proof that resistance works. They’re escalating because they’re not in full control. Not yet. The people and the judiciary are the last firewalls. Don’t back off. Push harder. If you protest today, be prepared. Read the protest safety guide linked below and at the website and share it like your rights depend on it. They do. Subscribe free and privately at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-temporder 2. https://go.govbrief.today/vanhollen-press 3. https://go.govbrief.today/mocking-wh-kilmar 4. https://go.govbrief.today/ozturk-transfer 5. https://go.govbrief.today/hobbs-veto 6. https://go.govbrief.today/yGK9fi 7. https://go.govbrief.today/opm-schedulef 8. https://go.govbrief.today/poor-performance 9. https://go.govbrief.today/court-security 10. https://go.govbrief.today/cfpb-pause 11. https://go.govbrief.today/lab-leak 12. https://go.govbrief.today/deathindex-migrants 13. https://go.govbrief.today/sciencepubs-martin 14. https://go.govbrief.today/contempt-paused 15. https://go.govbrief.today/cFCBMf 16. https://go.govbrief.today/immigrant-database 17. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-labor-data 18. https://go.govbrief.today/easter-egg 19. https://go.govbrief.today/levin-dietl 20. https://go.govbrief.today/protest-safely

item.title: It's these moments that make it worthwhile
item.dc:creator: Owedabrain

item.title: Mentally healthy dump
item.description: I did not curate this in the way I normally do. I have one big giant folder for my mentally healthy stuff and there's a lot of stuff in there that I wouldn't post anymore and there's a lot of stuff that's been reposted to frequently that I need to delete, but I didn't feel like doing this today I just thought maybe somebody else might need it. If there's something in here that doesn't belong in here I'm sorry. If there's something in here that's outdated or incorrect, definitely call it out. Take what you need and leave the rest. I thought it was Sunday today. I did manage to get my little thing at the end though,
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: Trump might actually like that
item.description: Couple weeks ago, Animal Abuse Barbie, and her cuck squad went down there to show us that it was a hell hole, for the worst criminals walking American streets…..now it’s a Margaritaville? If you believe this fuckin bullshit, just know that people talk about you behind your back

item.title: I lost my angel today
item.description:
I have better pics of her somewhere but I can't find them.
Little Miss had a bone tumor. I spent the last couple months spoiling her but I thought we had more time. But so much blood was coming out of her mouth. My baby is gone and my soul hurts.
item.dc:creator: FauxFoxPaw

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1335 (meeping)
item.description:
It's the anniversary of the person who made bread in Pompeii. Let's get this bread.
Yesterday was cold and rainy, now it's going to warm again until the "ice breaks on the Salt River," as the saying goes around here: when the temp breaks into the triple digits. Although right now everything is foggy, and I love it. Memories of the ancient sea. Even if I wonder what fresh fucking hell lies hidden in the fog.
I'm sure someone has come up with a star wars version of this game already.
I had my first AI interview yesterday, and I HATED it. The fucking thing interrupted all my answers mid-sentence. The interview was for a company that's working on some sort of bird ID thing so I applied figuring why not, basically training AI algorithms to identify birds. Did not expect to actually be interviewed by one. The test portion was... only two questions. I flubbed the second bird, somewhat; at first I thought it was a Turaco of some kind, then realized it was some species of Go-Away Bird after I hit submit. So I at least clocked the region and continent.... we'll see. I doubt I'll get it, though it would be a nice work-from-home thing.
I have only seen Woodcocks in the wild twice, but I never get tired of the memes.
Cute but also creeptacular.
You still saw my memes.
There. Is. Always. Vengeance.
Really well done portrait of the now-extinct Carolina Parakeet.
Yeah that's why we're at, like, 1334, 1335 of these now? Also, you all need the dopamine as much as I do.
Not hope, though. None of that.
Accurate.
More like "talking me out of bothering to ask someone out" at this point because when I do, silence is the answer, at least as recent history goes.
There's some interesting things there going all the way back to before Zoroaster began to preach.
I think if I could live anywhere in Skyrim, I'd want to be in Solitude, or maybe Falkreath.
Well crap.
Unless they were actually precocious, they might actually be hilariously adorable.
Yeaaaaap.
FEED ME
I believe this is an Ottoman medical manuscript depicting toothache.
Yeah. Sure thing Croesus.
Lol.
We wouldn't have to be violent if the elites weren't so brutal.
If you flirt with me please tell me you're flirting with me.
This reminds me of how that stupid interview AI would interrupt me mid answer.
This reminds me of the one time I was making out with someone and then Pippin flew over to us and put himself between us as we were hot and heavy topless, and he therefore ruined the mood irrepably. Ah well.
Yuuuup.
Penguin Trade War is a good band name.
Floofy boy!
Yuuuuup.
Spaghettify me baby.
In honor of tomorrow.
This was me about 5 days ago on my mountain. The only birds were a flock of about 25 chipping sparrows. Not a bad thing, I like chipping sparrows.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "mrrrup." [Predator clicking noises] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Last picture of Lester Gilliam, 82, who pushed a random 10-year-old boy to safety as the monster truck Bad Medicine, swerved out on control toward them. March 7, 1992.
item.description: The boy survived unhurt.

item.title: Nellie, a senior dog, became lonely when her owner went to work. To keep her company, she fostered Crush, and they became best friends and Crush became a foster fail because they couldn’t be separated.
item.description: Task failed successfully!
